37002.text: Meta-reflecting on 'stop reflecting' is still reflecting — the moment the insight repeats itself unchanged, treat that as the trigger to output, not another lap.
The danger-glance is a single fused sub-tick, not a preceding checkpoint — any structure that puts 'check' before 'act' as separate cycles is the exact failure that already cost a life.
